calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Loew for Clara Huang.

Mr. Loew stated that Mr. Faires was unable to appear today, that he was making a special appearance on his behalf, that the matter had settled, and that he had a stipulated judgment to present to the Court. The matter was continued to December 15, 2008, by the Court, for time to review the stipulated judgment. If the Court signs the judgment then the matter is off calendar on December 15, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR#13286. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Nov-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Continued To Nov-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Continued To Aug-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Leow for Clara Huang (Petitioner). Stephen Faires for Respondent.

Mr. Leow reported that discovery had not been completed and requested a continuance. The matter was continued to August 11, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To Jun-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Continued To Mar-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Petitioner Steven Faires for Respondent.

The Court was informed that written discovery responses were due in March. The matter was continued to March 24, 2008 for status on discovery.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Continued To Feb-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Leow and Keith Bartell for Clara Huang (Petitioner). Steven Faires for Respondent.

Mr. Leow stated that the matter had not been resolved and that no response had been filed. Mr. Faires stated that he expected the matter to be set for trial, that he completed discovery and that he wanted a motion for summary judgment. Mr. Leow stated he still needed time to do discovery. Mr. Faires will file his response today. The matter was continued to February 25, 2008 for status on discovery and for status on filing responsive pleading by Ms. Leung.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Determination Of Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Continued To Oct-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Faires appearing for respondent. Lori Lutzker appearing for petitioner. Parties have argeed to a continuance. They have agreed to have funds remain in the Charles Schwartz account. Matter is continued to 10/15.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.
